final_prompt.prompt:
Create a medical education infographic showing a 3D visualization of the human cardiovascular system with cross-sectional heart anatomy.

Style/medium: photorealistic medical illustration in the spirit of Frank Netter's anatomical precision, modern 3D rendered textures suitable for educational use
Composition: centered anatomical view with heart bisected to reveal internal chambers, surrounding major vessels arranged in anatomical position
Subject: human heart with four chambers (left/right atrium, left/right ventricle), cardiac valves, myocardial fiber textures visible, coronary arteries highlighted in gold on heart surface
Scene/backdrop: dark gradient background to maximize anatomical contrast, clean negative space reserved for text annotations
Lighting/mood: clinical directional lighting from upper left, subtle rim light to define vessel edges, focused illumination on cardiac structures
Color palette: arterial system in vivid red, venous system in deep blue, coronary arteries in gold highlight, dark neutral background
Materials/textures: realistic myocardial fiber striations, translucent vessel walls with subtle specularity, smooth 3D rendered organ surfaces
Text (verbatim): "左右心房、左右心室"
Constraints: must include clear visual separation between atria and ventricles, valve positions accurately depicted, blood flow direction indicated by arrows with subtle glow effects,预留标注文字空间
Avoid: cartoonish simplification, inaccurate anatomy, cluttered background, watermark, decorative flourishes, 8K stuffer aesthetic
